title: Jumbo 6.5" XL Carabiner Key Chain With Hand Grip - Blue
description:
Keep your sporting goods and fitness equipment handy with the Jumbo ASR Outdoor XL Aluminum Carabiner with Hand Grip! Attach one to your backpack, water bottle, keys or purse to keep things handy and organized. These carabiners are constructed of durable aluminum and come with a key ring for easy attachment to just about anything. Make sure to grab a few of these to keep around the house, your office or outdoor gear! Please note: these carabiners are NOT FOR CLIMBING.
